fields.label: From
fields.description: The name or number the message should be sent from

fields.label: To
fields.description: The number that the message should be sent to. Numbers are specified in E.164 format.

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The body of the message being sent

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: account-ref, callback, client-ref, message-class, protocol-id, status-report-req, ttl)
